comment: 54yo male with confirmed long-segment (>3cm) Barrett's esophagus on EGD, non-dysplastic. Chronic GERD on PPI. No current esophageal adenocarcinoma. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = EGD surveillance q3-5y for non-dysplastic Barrett's per ACG + high-dose PPI for symptom/healing; alternative = routine q5y cadence. Validates v0.3 Barrett's → esophageal AC prevention pilot.
